info.title: 干式套管最佳化排爐系統 API
info.description:
Current-state (baseline) OpenAPI spec for furnace-scheduling-system v2.0.0.
Generated from running :8005 API.
42 endpoints across 29 paths covering orders, molds, kilns, schedule, reports, process-steps.

get.description: 列出訂單，支援分頁、狀態篩選、全文搜尋
列出模具，支援分頁與低庫存篩選
列出所有干燥罐，支援分頁
排程 root redirect — 指向 /result 或 /optimize

post.description: 執行排程優化，清除舊排程，寫入新結果

get.description: 列出所有排程記錄，支援分頁與窯爐篩選
列出所有製程步驟，支援分頁與篩選

order_ids.title: Order Ids
order_ids.description: 要排程的訂單 ID，不傳則全部

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: 排程策略: deadline=交期優先, fill=窯滿優先, balance=平衡
